cards.content_en: If two vehicles arrive at the same time, the driver on the LEFT must yield to the driver on the RIGHT.
cards.content_zh: 同时到达 → 左让右
cards.content_zhHant: 同時到達 → 左讓右

cards.content_en: At an uncontrolled T-intersection, traffic on the through (continuing) road has the right-of-way.
cards.content_zh: 直行道拥有路权，转入者让行
cards.content_zhHant: 直行道擁有路權，轉入者讓行

cards.content_en: The vehicle going DOWNHILL must yield (back up) to the vehicle going UPHILL.
cards.content_zh: 下坡车让上坡车（下坡车倒退）
cards.content_zhHant: 下坡車讓上坡車（下坡車倒退）
cards.mistakeNote_en: Reason: uphill vehicle has less control in reverse
cards.mistakeNote_zh: 原因：上坡倒车更难控制
cards.mistakeNote_zhHant: 原因：上坡倒車更難控制

cards.content_en: Traffic moves COUNTERCLOCKWISE. Enter by turning RIGHT. Signal when changing lanes or exiting.
cards.content_zh: 逆时针行驶；右转进入；变道/出环岛打灯
cards.content_zhHant: 逆時針行駛；右轉進入；變道/出環島打燈

cards.content_en: Pull to the RIGHT edge and STOP. If in an intersection, drive THROUGH first, then pull over.
cards.content_zh: 靠右停车。如在路口中间 → 先驶过路口再靠右
cards.content_zhHant: 靠右停車。如在路口中間 → 先駛過路口再靠右
cards.mistakeNote_en: Never stop in the middle of an intersection

questions.stem_en: Two vehicles reach an uncontrolled intersection at the same time. Which vehicle must yield?
questions.stem_zh: 两辆车同时到达一个无标志路口。哪辆车必须让行？
questions.stem_zhHant: 兩輛車同時到達一個無標誌路口。哪輛車必須讓行？
questions.explanation_en: At an uncontrolled intersection, the vehicle on the left yields to the vehicle on the right.
questions.explanation_zh: 让右原则：左侧车辆让右侧车辆。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 讓右原則：左側車輛讓右側車輛。

questions.stem_en: On a narrow mountain road where two vehicles cannot pass, which vehicle should back up?
questions.stem_zh: 在狭窄山路上两车无法同时通过，哪辆车应该倒退？
questions.stem_zhHant: 在狹窄山路上兩車無法同時通過，哪輛車應該倒退？

options.text_en: The vehicle closer to a turnout

questions.explanation_en: The downhill vehicle must back up because the uphill vehicle has less control in reverse.
questions.explanation_zh: 下坡车倒退让行，因为上坡车倒车更难控制。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 下坡車倒退讓行，因為上坡車倒車更難控制。

questions.stem_en: When an emergency vehicle with sirens approaches while you are in the middle of an intersection, you should:
questions.stem_zh: 当紧急车辆鸣笛驶来而你正在路口中间时，你应该：
questions.stem_zhHant: 當緊急車輛鳴笛駛來而你正在路口中間時，你應該：

options.text_en: Drive through the intersection first, then pull to the right
options.text_zh: 先驶过路口，再靠右停车
options.text_zhHant: 先駛過路口，再靠右停車

options.text_en: Speed up to clear the intersection faster

questions.explanation_en: Never stop in the middle of an intersection. Drive through first, then pull to the right and stop.
questions.explanation_zh: 先驶过路口，再靠右停车。绝不停在路口中间。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 先駛過路口，再靠右停車。絕不停在路口中間。

questions.stem_en: In a roundabout, traffic moves:
questions.stem_zh: 在环岛中，车辆行驶方向为：
questions.stem_zhHant: 在環島中，車輛行駛方向為：

options.text_en: The direction of the arrows posted

questions.explanation_en: In the US, roundabout traffic flows counterclockwise. Enter by turning right.
questions.explanation_zh: 美国环岛逆时针行驶，右转进入。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 美國環島逆時針行駛，右轉進入。

questions.stem_en: At an uncontrolled T-intersection with no signs or signals, who has the right-of-way?
questions.stem_zh: 在没有标志或信号灯的T型路口，谁拥有路权？
questions.stem_zhHant: 在沒有標誌或信號燈的T型路口，誰擁有路權？

options.text_en: The vehicle turning onto the through road
The vehicle on the through (continuing) road

questions.explanation_en: At an uncontrolled T-intersection, traffic on the through (continuing) road has the right-of-way.
questions.explanation_zh: T型路口直行道拥有路权。
questions.explanation_zhHant: T型路口直行道擁有路權。

questions.stem_en: You are approaching a yield sign. What should you do?
questions.stem_zh: 你正在接近一个让行标志。你应该怎么做？
questions.stem_zhHant: 你正在接近一個讓行標誌。你應該怎麼做？

options.text_en: Slow down, check traffic, and be prepared to stop
options.text_zh: 减速，观察交通，准备停车
options.text_zhHant: 減速，觀察交通，準備停車

questions.explanation_en: A yield sign means slow down and be prepared to stop. You must yield the right-of-way to traffic and pedestrians.
questions.explanation_zh: 让行标志 → 减速，准备停车让行。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 讓行標誌 → 減速，準備停車讓行。

questions.stem_en: A pedestrian with a white cane is waiting at a crosswalk. You should:
questions.stem_zh: 一位持白手杖的行人在人行横道等候。你应该：
questions.stem_zhHant: 一位持白手杖的行人在人行橫道等候。你應該：

options.text_en: Honk to let them know you're there
options.text_zh: 按喇叭让他们知道你在
options.text_zhHant: 按喇叭讓他們知道你在

options.text_en: Stop and wait for them to cross, do not honk

questions.explanation_en: Never honk at a blind pedestrian. Stop and wait. If they pull back their cane, it usually means you may proceed.
questions.explanation_zh: 绝不对盲人行人按喇叭。停车等待。盲人收起手杖 → 通常表示你可以通行。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 絕不對盲人行人按喇叭。停車等待。盲人收起手杖 → 通常表示你可以通行。

questions.stem_en: You approach a school bus that has its red lights flashing and its stop sign extended. You must:
questions.stem_zh: 你驶近一辆闪着红灯并伸出停车标志的校车。你必须：
questions.stem_zhHant: 你駛近一輛閃著紅燈並伸出停車標誌的校車。你必須：

options.text_en: Slow down to 25 mph and pass carefully
options.text_zh: 减速到25英里并小心通过
options.text_zhHant: 減速到25英里並小心通過

options.text_en: Stop only if you are behind the bus
options.text_zh: 只有在校车后方才需要停车
options.text_zhHant: 只有在校車後方才需要停車

options.text_en: Stop only if children are visible
options.text_zh: 只有看到孩子才需要停车
options.text_zhHant: 只有看到孩子才需要停車

questions.explanation_en: When a school bus flashes red and extends its stop arm, ALL traffic from BOTH directions must stop. Exception: on a divided highway with a physical barrier, opposite-direction traffic need not stop.
questions.explanation_zh: 校车闪红灯+伸STOP → 双向停车。唯一例外：有物理隔离的分隔公路对面车辆无需停。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 校車閃紅燈+伸STOP → 雙向停車。唯一例外：有物理隔離的分隔公路對面車輛無需停。

coreRule.content_en: Sudden loss of control → ease off gas, do NOT brake. ONLY exception: driving off pavement → gentle braking OK.
coreRule.content_zh: 突然失控 → 松油门，不踩刹车。唯一例外：冲出路面 → 可轻踩刹车
coreRule.content_zhHant: 突然失控 → 鬆油門，不踩剎車。唯一例外：衝出路面 → 可輕踩剎車

cards.content_en: Ease off the gas. Do NOT brake. Steer in the direction the rear of the vehicle is sliding.
cards.content_zh: 松油门 → 不踩刹车 → 方向盘转向打滑方向
cards.content_zhHant: 鬆油門 → 不踩剎車 → 方向盤轉向打滑方向

cards.content_en: Gradually slow down. Do NOT use brakes.
cards.content_zh: 逐渐减速 → 绝不踩刹车
cards.content_zhHant: 逐漸減速 → 絕不踩剎車

cards.content_en: Grip the steering wheel firmly. Gradually release the accelerator. Do NOT slam brakes. Keep the vehicle going straight.
cards.content_zh: 紧握方向盘 → 慢松油门 → 不踩刹车 → 保持直线
cards.content_zhHant: 緊握方向盤 → 慢鬆油門 → 不踩剎車 → 保持直線

cards.content_en: Grip wheel, ease off gas, brake GENTLY. Do NOT jerk the wheel to return to road.
cards.content_zh: 握紧方向盘 → 松油门 → 轻踩刹车 → 不要猛打方向盘
cards.content_zhHant: 握緊方向盤 → 鬆油門 → 輕踩剎車 → 不要猛打方向盤
cards.mistakeNote_en: This is the ONLY emergency where gentle braking is OK
cards.mistakeNote_zh: 这是唯一可以轻踩刹车的紧急情况
cards.mistakeNote_zhHant: 這是唯一可以輕踩剎車的緊急情況

cards.content_en: Pump the brakes rapidly. Downshift to lower gear or neutral. Use emergency/parking brake.
cards.content_zh: 快速点刹 → 降档/空挡 → 拉手刹
cards.content_zhHant: 快速點剎 → 降檔/空檔 → 拉手剎

cards.content_en: Lightly press both the accelerator and brake pedals at the same time until brakes dry.
cards.content_zh: 同时轻踩油门+刹车，直到刹车变干
cards.content_zhHant: 同時輕踩油門+剎車，直到剎車變乾
cards.mistakeNote_en: The ONLY situation where you press gas and brake at the same time
cards.mistakeNote_zh: 这是唯一一个需要同时踩油门和刹车的情况
cards.mistakeNote_zhHant: 這是唯一一個需要同時踩油門和剎車的情況

cards.content_en: Shift to LOW GEAR before descending. Use engine braking to prevent brake overheating.
cards.content_zh: 下坡前换低速档，利用发动机制动
cards.content_zhHant: 下坡前換低速檔，利用引擎制動

cards.content_en: Shift to low gear, keep front wheels straight, gently press gas. Rock vehicle forward/reverse if needed. Do NOT spin wheels.
cards.content_zh: 低速档 → 前轮直 → 轻踩油门 → 前后摇摆脱困 → 不要让车轮空转
cards.content_zhHant: 低速檔 → 前輪直 → 輕踩油門 → 前後搖擺脫困 → 不要讓車輪空轉

questions.stem_en: Your vehicle starts to hydroplane. You should:
questions.stem_zh: 你的车辆开始水滑。你应该：
questions.stem_zhHant: 你的車輛開始水滑。你應該：

options.text_en: Gradually slow down without using the brakes

questions.explanation_en: When hydroplaning, gradually slow down. Do NOT brake.
questions.explanation_zh: 水滑时逐渐减速，绝不踩刹车。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 水滑時逐漸減速，絕不踩剎車。

questions.stem_en: You have a tire blowout while driving. Your first action should be:
questions.stem_zh: 行驶中爆胎。你的第一步应该是：
questions.stem_zhHant: 行駛中爆胎。你的第一步應該是：

options.text_en: Grip the steering wheel firmly and gradually release the accelerator
options.text_zh: 紧握方向盘并慢松油门
options.text_zhHant: 緊握方向盤並慢鬆油門

questions.explanation_en: Grip the wheel, keep the vehicle straight, and gradually ease off the gas.
questions.explanation_zh: 紧握方向盘 → 慢松油门 → 保持直线 → 不踩刹车。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 緊握方向盤 → 慢鬆油門 → 保持直線 → 不踩剎車。

questions.stem_en: Your right wheels run off the pavement. You should:
questions.stem_zh: 你的右侧车轮驶离路面。你应该：
questions.stem_zhHant: 你的右側車輪駛離路面。你應該：

options.text_en: Ease off the gas, brake gently, and carefully steer back
options.text_zh: 松油门，轻踩刹车，小心转回
options.text_zhHant: 鬆油門，輕踩剎車，小心轉回

questions.explanation_en: Ease off the gas, brake gently, and steer back carefully. Jerking the wheel could send you into oncoming traffic.
questions.explanation_zh: 松油门 → 轻踩刹车 → 小心转回。猛打方向盘可能冲入对向车道。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 鬆油門 → 輕踩剎車 → 小心轉回。猛打方向盤可能衝入對向車道。

questions.stem_en: Your brake pedal sinks to the floor. What should you do FIRST?
questions.stem_zh: 你的刹车踏板踩到底。你应该首先做什么？
questions.stem_zhHant: 你的剎車踏板踩到底。你應該首先做什麼？

options.text_en: Use the steering wheel to slow down

questions.explanation_en: Pump the brakes to try to restore pressure. Then downshift and use the emergency brake.
questions.explanation_zh: 先快速点刹 → 降档 → 拉手刹。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 先快速點剎 → 降檔 → 拉手剎。

questions.stem_en: If your brakes get wet, you can dry them by:
questions.stem_zh: 如果你的刹车变湿了，你可以通过以下方式弄干：
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果你的剎車變濕了，你可以通過以下方式弄乾：

options.text_en: Pressing the brake pedal hard for 5 seconds
Lightly pressing the accelerator and brake pedals at the same time

questions.explanation_en: Lightly press both the gas and brake pedals simultaneously until the brakes dry out.
questions.explanation_zh: 同时轻踩油门和刹车，直到刹车变干。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 同時輕踩油門和剎車，直到剎車變乾。

questions.stem_en: Before driving down a steep hill, you should:
questions.stem_zh: 在下陡坡之前，你应该：
questions.stem_zhHant: 在下陡坡之前，你應該：
questions.explanation_en: Shift to low gear before descending to use engine braking.
questions.explanation_zh: 下坡前换低速档，利用发动机制动。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 下坡前換低速檔，利用引擎制動。

questions.stem_en: Your vehicle is stuck in snow. You should:
questions.stem_zh: 你的车辆陷入雪地。你应该：
questions.stem_zhHant: 你的車輛陷入雪地。你應該：

options.text_en: Shift to low gear, keep wheels straight, gently press gas
options.text_zh: 换低速档，保持车轮直线，轻踩油门
options.text_zhHant: 換低速檔，保持車輪直線，輕踩油門

options.text_en: Shift to high gear and accelerate
Turn the steering wheel back and forth

questions.explanation_en: Shift to low gear, keep front wheels straight, and gently accelerate.
questions.explanation_zh: 低速档 → 前轮直 → 轻踩油门。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 低速檔 → 前輪直 → 輕踩油門。

questions.stem_en: When your vehicle starts to skid on a slippery road, you should:
questions.stem_zh: 当你的车辆在湿滑路面开始打滑时，你应该：
questions.stem_zhHant: 當你的車輛在濕滑路面開始打滑時，你應該：

options.text_en: Ease off the gas and steer in the direction the rear is sliding
options.text_zh: 松油门并转向车尾打滑方向
options.text_zhHant: 鬆油門並轉向車尾打滑方向

questions.explanation_en: Release the gas, do not brake, and steer in the direction the rear of the car is sliding.
questions.explanation_zh: 松油门 → 不踩刹车 → 方向盘转向车尾打滑方向。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 鬆油門 → 不踩剎車 → 方向盤轉向車尾打滑方向。

questions.stem_en: When parking a manual transmission vehicle on a hill, in addition to the parking brake, you should:
questions.stem_zh: 在坡道停放手动挡车辆时，除了拉手刹，你还应该：
questions.stem_zhHant: 在坡道停放手動擋車輛時，除了拉手剎，你還應該：
questions.explanation_en: For manual transmission: leave in gear (1st gear uphill, reverse downhill).
questions.explanation_zh: 手动挡坡道停车：除拉手刹外，需挂挡（上坡1档，下坡倒档）。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 手動擋坡道停車：除拉手剎外，需掛檔（上坡1檔，下坡倒檔）。

questions.stem_en: The ONLY emergency situation where you should gently apply the brakes is:
questions.stem_zh: 唯一可以轻踩刹车的紧急情况是：
questions.stem_zhHant: 唯一可以輕踩剎車的緊急情況是：
questions.explanation_en: Driving off the pavement is the only emergency where gentle braking is appropriate.
questions.explanation_zh: 冲出路面是唯一可以轻踩刹车的紧急情况。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 衝出路面是唯一可以輕踩剎車的緊急情況。

cards.content_en: Barrier between regular lanes and HOV/carpool lanes. Do NOT cross. Wait for broken line openings.
cards.content_zh: 常规车道与HOV道之间的屏障。严禁跨越，需等虚线处进出。
cards.content_zhHant: 常規車道與HOV道之間的屏障。嚴禁跨越，需等虛線處進出。

cards.content_en: Solid white triangles pointing toward approaching traffic. Must yield or stop.
cards.content_zh: 白色实心三角形（鲨鱼齿），必须让行或停车。
cards.content_zhHant: 白色實心三角形（鯊魚齒），必須讓行或停車。

cards.content_en: Marked by white dashed lines or raised buttons for transit passengers. NEVER drive through.
cards.content_zh: 公交/有轨电车乘客等候区。任何情况下禁止驶入。
cards.content_zhHant: 公交/有軌電車乘客等候區。任何情況下禁止駛入。

cards.content_en: On two-lane roads, if driving slowly with 5+ vehicles behind you, pull into turnout.
cards.content_zh: 双车道公路慢行且身后跟了5辆+ → 必须驶入让车区。
cards.content_zhHant: 雙車道公路慢行且身後跟了5輛+ → 必須駛入讓車區。

cards.content_en: May not travel more than 200 feet in this lane.
cards.content_zh: 中央左转道行驶不得超过200英尺。
cards.content_zhHant: 中央左轉道行駛不得超過200英尺。

questions.stem_en: Double solid white lines on the road indicate:
questions.stem_zh: 路面上的双实白线表示：
questions.stem_zhHant: 路面上的雙實白線表示：

options.text_en: A barrier that should not be crossed

questions.explanation_en: Double solid white lines act as a barrier. Do not cross them.
questions.explanation_zh: 双实白线是屏障线，严禁跨越。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 雙實白線是屏障線，嚴禁跨越。

questions.stem_en: You are driving slowly on a two-lane highway and ___ or more vehicles are following you. You must:
questions.stem_zh: 你在双车道公路上慢行，身后有___辆以上车辆跟随。你必须：
questions.stem_zhHant: 你在雙車道公路上慢行，身後有___輛以上車輛跟隨。你必須：
questions.explanation_en: If 5 or more vehicles are behind you, pull into a turnout area.
questions.explanation_zh: 身后跟了5辆以上 → 必须驶入让车区让行。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 身後跟了5輛以上 → 必須駛入讓車區讓行。

questions.stem_en: You may drive in a center left-turn lane for no more than:
questions.stem_zh: 你在中央左转道中行驶不得超过：
questions.stem_zhHant: 你在中央左轉道中行駛不得超過：
questions.explanation_en: Do not travel more than 200 feet in a center left-turn lane.
questions.explanation_zh: 中央左转道行驶不超过200英尺。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 中央左轉道行駛不超過200英尺。

questions.stem_en: A "safety zone" marked on the road is:
questions.stem_zh: 路面上标记的“安全区”是：
questions.stem_zhHant: 路面上標記的「安全區」是：

options.text_en: A safe place to make a U-turn
An area for pedestrians waiting for transit — never drive through it
options.text_zh: 公交乘客等候区——任何情况下禁止驶入
options.text_zhHant: 公交乘客等候區——任何情況下禁止駛入

questions.explanation_en: Safety zones are for transit passengers. NEVER drive through.
questions.explanation_zh: 安全区是公交乘客等候区，任何情况下禁止驶入。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 安全區是公交乘客等候區，任何情況下禁止駛入。

questions.stem_en: You may enter a bicycle lane within ___ feet of an intersection to make a right turn.
questions.stem_zh: 你可以在路口前___英尺内进入自行车道准备右转。
questions.stem_zhHant: 你可以在路口前___英尺內進入自行車道準備右轉。
questions.explanation_en: Enter a bike lane no more than 200 feet before the intersection for a right turn.
questions.explanation_zh: 路口前200英尺内可进入自行车道准备右转。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 路口前200英尺內可進入自行車道準備右轉。

cards.content_en: Red lights flashing + stop sign → ALL traffic BOTH directions must stop. EXCEPTION: Divided highway with physical barrier → opposite side need not stop.
cards.content_zh: 校车红灯+STOP → 双向停车。唯一例外：有物理隔离的分隔公路对面无需停。
cards.content_zhHant: 校車紅燈+STOP → 雙向停車。唯一例外：有物理隔離的分隔公路對面無需停。

cards.content_en: Do NOT pass a light rail vehicle on the LEFT. Drop to the rear to make turns.
cards.content_zh: 不得从左侧超越轻轨。需在后方跟随后再转弯/变道。
cards.content_zhHant: 不得從左側超越輕軌。需在後方跟隨後再轉彎/變道。
cards.mistakeNote_en: Exceptions: single one-way street; tracks too far right; police direction
cards.mistakeNote_zh: 例外：单行道/轨道太靠右/警察指挥
cards.mistakeNote_zhHant: 例外：單行道/軌道太靠右/警察指揮

cards.content_en: If you can't see the truck driver in their mirrors, they can't see you. Trucks turning right may swing left first.
cards.content_zh: 你看不到卡车司机 → 司机也看不到你。卡车右转可能先左摆。
cards.content_zhHant: 你看不到卡車司機 → 司機也看不到你。卡車右轉可能先左擺。

cards.content_en: Bicyclists may legally use left-turn lanes. Pass with at least 3 feet clearance.
cards.content_zh: 自行车可以合法使用左转车道。超车保持至少3英尺。
cards.content_zhHant: 自行車可以合法使用左轉車道。超車保持至少3英尺。

cards.content_en: If a blind person pulls back their cane and steps away, you may proceed. Never honk.
cards.content_zh: 盲人收起手杖退离路口 → 你可以通行。不要按喇叭。
cards.content_zhHant: 盲人收起手杖退離路口 → 你可以通行。不要按喇叭。

cards.content_en: Crime. Up to $1,000 fine, up to 6 months in jail, or both.
cards.content_zh: 在高速公路上遗弃动物是犯罪。最高$1000罚款+最高6个月监禁。
cards.content_zhHant: 在高速公路上遺棄動物是犯罪。最高$1000罰款+最高6個月監禁。

questions.stem_en: When sharing the road with a light rail vehicle, you should:
questions.stem_zh: 与轻轨共享道路时，你应该：
questions.stem_zhHant: 與輕軌共享道路時，你應該：

options.text_en: Never turn in front of it; drop to the rear
options.text_zh: 绝不在其前方转弯；退到后方
options.text_zhHant: 絕不在其前方轉彎；退到後方

questions.explanation_en: Never turn in front of a light rail vehicle. Fall back behind it. Do NOT pass on the left unless on one-way street, tracks too far right, or police direct.
questions.explanation_zh: 绝不在轻轨前方转弯。退到后方再转弯/变道。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 絕不在輕軌前方轉彎。退到後方再轉彎/變道。

questions.stem_en: It is illegal to dump or abandon an animal on a highway. The penalty can include:
questions.stem_zh: 在高速公路上丢弃或遗弃动物是违法的。处罚可能包括：
questions.stem_zhHant: 在高速公路上丟棄或遺棄動物是違法的。處罰可能包括：

options.text_en: Up to $1,000 fine and/or 6 months in jail
options.text_zh: 最高$1000罚款和/或6个月监禁
options.text_zhHant: 最高$1000罰款和/或6個月監禁

questions.explanation_en: Up to $1,000 fine, up to 6 months in jail, or both.
questions.explanation_zh: 最高$1000罚款+最高6个月监禁。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 最高$1000罰款+最高6個月監禁。

questions.stem_en: When a school bus is flashing red lights on a two-lane road, you must:
questions.stem_zh: 校车在双车道公路上闪红灯时，你必须：
questions.stem_zhHant: 校車在雙車道公路上閃紅燈時，你必須：

options.text_zh: 没看到孩子就可以继续
options.text_zhHant: 沒看到孩子就可以繼續

questions.explanation_en: On a non-divided road, traffic from BOTH directions must stop.
questions.explanation_zh: 非分隔道路 → 双向必须停车。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 非分隔道路 → 雙向必須停車。

questions.stem_en: The exception to stopping for a school bus with flashing red lights applies when:
questions.stem_zh: 校车闪红灯时不需要停车的例外情况是：
questions.stem_zhHant: 校車閃紅燈時不需要停車的例外情況是：

options.text_en: Opposite side of divided highway with physical barrier
options.text_zh: 有物理隔离的分隔公路对面
options.text_zhHant: 有物理隔離的分隔公路對面

questions.explanation_en: Only on a divided highway with a physical barrier.
questions.explanation_zh: 唯一例外：有物理隔离的分隔公路。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 唯一例外：有物理隔離的分隔公路。

questions.stem_en: If you cannot see a truck driver in their mirrors, you should assume:
questions.stem_zh: 如果你在卡车的后视镜中看不到卡车司机，你应该假设：
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果你在卡車的後視鏡中看不到卡車司機，你應該假設：

options.text_en: Driver can see you with cameras
options.text_zh: 司机可以通过摄像头看到你
options.text_zhHant: 司機可以通過攝像頭看到你

questions.explanation_en: If you can't see the truck driver, they cannot see you.
questions.explanation_zh: 你看不到卡车司机 → 司机也看不到你。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 你看不到卡車司機 → 司機也看不到你。

questions.stem_en: A bicyclist ahead signals a left turn. This is:
questions.stem_zh: 前方一位骑自行车的人发出左转信号。这是：
questions.stem_zhHant: 前方一位騎自行車的人發出左轉信號。這是：

options.text_en: Legal — bicycles may use left-turn lanes
options.text_zh: 合法的——自行车可以使用左转车道
options.text_zhHant: 合法的——自行車可以使用左轉車道

options.text_en: Only legal with bike signal light
options.text_zh: 仅在有自行车信号灯时合法
options.text_zhHant: 僅在有自行車信號燈時合法

questions.explanation_en: Bicyclists have the legal right to use left-turn lanes.
questions.explanation_zh: 自行车可以合法使用左转车道。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 自行車可以合法使用左轉車道。

questions.stem_en: A blind pedestrian is at a crosswalk with a white cane extended. You should:
questions.stem_zh: 一位盲人行人在人行横道上伸出白手杖。你应该：
questions.stem_zhHant: 一位盲人行人在人行橫道上伸出白手杖。你應該：
questions.explanation_en: Stop and wait. NEVER honk at a blind pedestrian.
questions.explanation_zh: 停车等待，绝不按喇叭。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 停車等待，絕不按喇叭。

questions.stem_en: A person convicted of evading police (misdemeanor — no injuries) faces up to:
questions.stem_zh: 因逃避警察被定罪（轻罪——无人受伤）的人面临最高：
questions.stem_zhHant: 因逃避警察被定罪（輕罪——無人受傷）的人面臨最高：
questions.explanation_en: Misdemeanor: up to 1 year county jail. Serious injury: up to 7 years state prison. Death: 4-10 years state prison.
questions.explanation_zh: 轻罪→县监狱最高1年。致重伤→州监狱最高7年。致死→州监狱4-10年。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 輕罪→縣監獄最高1年。致重傷→州監獄最高7年。致死→州監獄4-10年。

rows.aid_en: Car rolls off road, not into traffic
rows.aid_zh: 车子滚向路肩，不会冲入车道
rows.aid_zhHant: 車子滾向路肩，不會衝入車道

cards.content_en: Red: No stopping/parking (fire lanes). Yellow: Loading only; non-commercial must stay in vehicle. Green: Time-limited parking. White: Time-limited passenger loading. Blue: Disabled only; cross-hatched area also no parking.
cards.content_zh: 红色：禁止停车（消防通道）。黄色：仅装卸货；非商用车须留人在车内。绿色：限时停车。白色：限时上下客。蓝色：残疾人专用；旁边斜线区域也禁停。
cards.content_zhHant: 紅色：禁止停車（消防通道）。黃色：僅裝卸貨；非商用車須留人在車內。綠色：限時停車。白色：限時上下客。藍色：殘疾人專用；旁邊斜線區域也禁停。

colorDetails.meaning_en: Loading only; non-commercial must stay in vehicle
colorDetails.meaning_zh: 仅装卸货；非商用车须留人在车内
colorDetails.meaning_zhHant: 僅裝卸貨；非商用車須留人在車內

colorDetails.meaning_en: Disabled only; cross-hatched area also no parking
colorDetails.meaning_zh: 残疾人专用；旁边斜线区域也禁停
colorDetails.meaning_zhHant: 殘疾人專用；旁邊斜線區域也禁停

cards.content_en: Recommended for low-speed turns, parking, and recovering from skids. Not for highway cruising.
cards.content_zh: 用于低速转弯、泊车和恢复打滑，不用于高速巡航。
cards.content_zhHant: 用於低速轉彎、泊車和恢復打滑，不用於高速巡航。

questions.stem_en: Parking downhill with curb, turn wheels:
questions.stem_zh: 下坡有路缘停车，方向盘打向：
questions.stem_zhHant: 下坡有路緣停車，方向盤打向：
questions.explanation_en: Turn toward curb so car rolls into curb.
questions.explanation_zh: 下坡有路缘 → 向右打死。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 下坡有路緣 → 向右打死。

questions.stem_en: Parking uphill with curb, turn wheels:
questions.stem_zh: 上坡有路缘停车，方向盘打向：
questions.stem_zhHant: 上坡有路緣停車，方向盤打向：
questions.explanation_en: Turn away from curb; if brakes fail, wheel catches curb rolling back.
questions.explanation_zh: 上坡有路缘 → 向左打死。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 上坡有路緣 → 向左打死。

questions.stem_en: Parked on any hill with NO curb, turn wheels:
questions.stem_zh: 在无路缘的坡道停车，方向盘打向：
questions.stem_zhHant: 在無路緣的坡道停車，方向盤打向：
questions.explanation_en: No curb: always right toward shoulder.
questions.explanation_zh: 无路缘 → 一律向右打死。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 無路緣 → 一律向右打死。

questions.stem_en: Blue curb means:
questions.stem_zh: 蓝色路缘表示：
questions.stem_zhHant: 藍色路緣表示：
questions.explanation_en: Blue = disabled only. Cross-hatched area next to it also no-parking.
questions.explanation_zh: 蓝色路缘=残疾人专用。旁边斜线区域也禁停。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 藍色路緣=殘疾人專用。旁邊斜線區域也禁停。

questions.stem_en: Hand-over-hand steering is recommended for all EXCEPT:
questions.stem_zh: 交叉式转向适用于以下所有情况，除了：
questions.stem_zhHant: 交叉式轉向適用於以下所有情況，除了：
questions.explanation_en: For low-speed turns, parking, and skid recovery — not highway cruising.
questions.explanation_zh: 用于低速转弯、泊车和恢复打滑，不用于高速巡航。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 用於低速轉彎、泊車和恢復打滑，不用於高速巡航。

cards.content_en: Required in rain, snow, fog, or when wipers are on → use LOW BEAMS. Only parking lights = ILLEGAL.
cards.content_zh: 雨/雪/雾/开雨刮 → 必须开近光灯。仅用停车灯行驶违法。
cards.content_zhHant: 雨/雪/霧/開雨刮 → 必須開近光燈。僅用停車燈行駛違法。

cards.content_en: Dim to low beams when following within 300 ft or when oncoming traffic is within 500 ft.
cards.content_zh: 跟车300英尺内 / 会车500英尺内 → 切近光灯
cards.content_zhHant: 跟車300英尺內 / 會車500英尺內 → 切近光燈

cards.content_en: From 30 min after sunset to 30 min before sunrise; or when you cannot see 1000 ft ahead.
cards.content_zh: 日落后30分钟到日出前30分钟；或看不清前方1000英尺时
cards.content_zhHant: 日落後30分鐘到日出前30分鐘；或看不清前方1000英尺時

cards.content_en: Keep hands visible. Do NOT exit unless asked. CA law prohibits police from asking immigration status. You have the right to record.
cards.content_zh: 手放在警察能看到的地方 → 不要下车 → 加州禁止询问移民身份 → 可录制
cards.content_zhHant: 手放在警察能看到的地方 → 不要下車 → 加州禁止詢問移民身份 → 可錄製

cards.content_en: By driving on CA roads, you agree to submit to a chemical test if LAWFULLY ARRESTED for DUI.
cards.content_zh: 在加州驾驶 = 同意在被合法逮捕DUI时接受化学测试
cards.content_zhHant: 在加州駕駛 = 同意在被合法逮捕DUI時接受化學測試

questions.stem_en: In fog, you should use:
questions.stem_zh: 在雾天，你应该使用：
questions.stem_zhHant: 在霧天，你應該使用：
questions.explanation_en: In fog/rain/snow, use low beams. High beams reflect off moisture. Parking lights only is illegal.
questions.explanation_zh: 雾天/雨天/雪天 → 近光灯。远光灯反射水雾。仅用停车灯违法。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 霧天/雨天/雪天 → 近光燈。遠光燈反射水霧。僅用停車燈違法。

questions.stem_en: Dim headlights when oncoming vehicle is within:
questions.stem_zh: 对面来车在多少距离内时应切换近光灯：
questions.stem_zhHant: 對面來車在多少距離內時應切換近光燈：
questions.explanation_en: Low beams when oncoming within 500 ft, or following within 300 ft.
questions.explanation_zh: 会车500英尺/跟车300英尺 → 切近光。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 會車500英尺/跟車300英尺 → 切近光。

questions.stem_en: What does California's implied consent law mean?
questions.stem_zh: 加州的隐含同意法是什么意思？
questions.stem_zhHant: 加州的隱含同意法是什麼意思？

options.text_en: By driving on CA roads, you agree to chemical test if lawfully arrested for DUI
options.text_zh: 在加州驾驶即同意在被合法逮捕DUI时接受化学测试
options.text_zhHant: 在加州駕駛即同意在被合法逮捕DUI時接受化學測試

options.text_en: Police can test at any time

questions.explanation_en: Implied consent = agreed to chemical test IF lawfully arrested for DUI. Key: "lawfully arrested."
questions.explanation_zh: 隐含同意法：在加州驾驶=同意在被合法逮捕DUI时接受化学测试。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 隱含同意法：在加州駕駛=同意在被合法逮捕DUI時接受化學測試。

questions.stem_en: During a traffic stop, you should:
questions.stem_zh: 被警察截停时，你应该：
questions.stem_zhHant: 被警察截停時，你應該：
questions.explanation_en: Keep hands visible. Don't exit unless instructed. CA prohibits asking immigration status. May record.
questions.explanation_zh: 手放在可见位置→不要下车→加州禁止询问移民身份→可录制。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 手放在可見位置→不要下車→加州禁止詢問移民身份→可錄製。

questions.stem_en: When must you turn on headlights?
questions.stem_zh: 什么时候必须打开车灯？
questions.stem_zhHant: 什麼時候必須打開車燈？

options.text_en: 30 min after sunset to 30 min before sunrise, or can't see 1000 ft ahead
options.text_zh: 日落后30分钟到日出前30分钟，或看不清前方1000英尺
options.text_zhHant: 日落後30分鐘到日出前30分鐘，或看不清前方1000英尺

questions.explanation_en: 30 min after sunset to 30 min before sunrise, and when can't see 1000 ft ahead.
questions.explanation_zh: 日落后30分钟到日出前30分钟，或看不清前方1000英尺时。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 日落後30分鐘到日出前30分鐘，或看不清前方1000英尺時。
